Game: The King of Rally 1992-12-28T00:00:00-08:00 The King of Rally, or The King of Rally: Paris - Moscow - Beijing, is a cross-continental rally racing game for the Super Famicom. The perspective is at a slight overhead angle, making full use of the Super Nintendo's Mode 7. <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/dbbfb924-24d8-412e-aed0-ec31a7a3afa4.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/62de6206-622a-4c26-a96f-cc2e1cd55709.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/46357e40-f6fe-4ff2-ab4c-7d863eda29a3.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/cc729d58-513b-4328-9868-ddd7e1e636a0.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/6ce4eb32-1995-40a8-910a-d2c2584a01be.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/3fd31328-2e3a-4ff5-b8d0-8f9561ad2d87.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/2d301771-8d6d-4624-b3f7-65d532f4ce0d.png https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_King_of_Rally Racing KAZe Co., Ltd. Meldac of Japan
